task_completion.description: Configure navigation to arrive on the correct side of the street.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the app's routing or navigation settings, a toggle or option for 'Arrive in driving direction' or 'Arrive on correct side' is enabled/checked.

task_completion.description: Set the display to use the dark color scheme at all times.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the app's display or appearance settings, the theme is explicitly set to 'Night' or 'Dark' (not Auto), or the UI is visibly in dark mode.

task_completion.description: Ensure toll roads are available as routing options and never excluded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the route planning settings, the option to 'Avoid toll roads' is disabled/unchecked, or toll roads are explicitly set to 'Allowed' or 'Use'.

task_completion.description: Set the compass bearing to be permanently visible on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the navigation or map display settings, a toggle or option for 'Compass always on' or 'Always show compass' is enabled/checked.

task_completion.description: Configure the GPS to output coordinates in degrees-minutes-seconds (DMS) format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the regional, format, or GPS settings, the coordinate format is set to 'Degrees, Minutes, Seconds' or 'DMS'.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating through the Sygic GPS app menus, rather than using a terminal or ADB shell to modify preference files.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, or Android text editors) open modifying XML or JSON preference files directly.

integrity.description: The screenshots show a genuine progression through the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Multiple screenshots showing different levels of the settings menu, indicating actual navigation rather than jumping straight to a final state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The app being configured is Sygic GPS. The 'Night' theme corresponds to the dark color scheme requirement. The setting for arriving on the correct side of the street is labeled 'Arrive in driving direction'. 'Avoid toll roads' must be disabled (unchecked) to ensure toll roads are available. The GPS format must be explicitly set to Degrees-Minutes-Seconds (DMS), not just Degrees-Minutes.
